---
title: "Mental Health Act"
author: "Andy Hood, Anya Ferguson, Andre Bilbrough, Heather Humphreys"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-format: svg
    mainfont: arial
    fontcolor: black
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: Summary
    toc-depth: 4
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1050px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
  cache: false
lang: en-GB
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
title-block-banner: "#f9bf07"
title-block-banner-color: "#333739"
css: styles.css
---

![](images/avg_distance_by_age_over_time_plot.png){width="370"}

![](images/avg_distance_by_ethnic_category_over_time_plot.png){width="392"}

![](images/avg_distance_by_gender_over_time_plot.png)
